ancestryScopeSummary.autosomal: Autosomal world ancestry can summarize broad reference-panel similarity when a model is supplied; this fixture does not supply calibrated percentages.
ancestryScopeSummary.referencePanel: Reference panels provide comparison context, not a fixed identity label or exact origin.

whatThisDoesNotMean: This is not an exact global or regional ethnicity percentage.

This is not a health or disease-risk report.
